title: How Modern Software and AI Systems Are Built: A Process-Driven Approach
What If? A Conversation About Life, Choices, and Possibilities

practice_words.example: My future will look like something completely different if I change careers.
She wants to study abroad next year.
They are planning to travel to Europe this summer.
I thought I would have finished the project by now.
I will start working on the task right away.
I hope everything will work out in the end.
